prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约9479→7509→6791→9270→10565，整体呈\"先升后降\"走势：2021-2023年逐年前移（从9479升至6791），2024年转后移至 9270，2025年进一步后移至10565，近两年累计后移约3774名，后移趋势明显；2025年基准约10565名；本省物理类计划2021年73人、2022年64人、2023年69人、 2024年72人、2025年75人，呈小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划76人，较2025年增加1人，扩招幅度约1.3%，对竞争影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科 中国大学排名从2021年第65名持续上升至2026年第52名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强，对考生吸引力有所增加；2023年声誉评价为偏负面（ 涉及学校管理事件），但近年无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第71位，评价为\"一般\"，短视频平台曝光量中等，未见明显报考关注升温信号；历史投档异常记录中未出现江南 大学，录取走势相对平稳；轻工技术与工程A+、食品科学与工程A+，两个学科均为全国顶尖水平；食品科学与工程为该校王牌专业，在黑龙江省招生中位次靠前 ，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 食品科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、人工智能等专业社会热度较高；黑龙江省2026年普通高考总人数167000人，较20 25年（物理类117407+历史类54707=172114）减少约5114人（-3%），按近年物理类占比约67%估算，2026物理类考生约111890人，较2025年117407人减少约5517人（-4.7%），考生 规模明显缩减，竞争压力有所缓解；江南大学位于江苏无锡，属长三角经济发达地区，对黑龙江省考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在黑龙江省招生规模稳定在70余人，占比较小，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年持续后移趋势、2026年计划微扩1人、黑龙江省物理类考 生减少约4.7%以及学校排名持续上升等因素：考生减少是缓解竞争的主要因素，但学校层次提升和优势学科吸引力部分抵消了该效应。预测2026年物理类最低位次约10600名，较2 025年10565名基本持平略后移（位次数字略增大），区间10100-11100名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 9479 → 7509 → 6791 → 9270 → 10565, showing an overall trend of "first rising then falling": from 2021 to 2023, it moved forward year by year (from 9479 to 6791), then shifted backward to 9270 in 2024, and further backward to 10565 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3774 places in the last two years, indicating a clear backward trend; the baseline for 2025 is about 10565; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 73 in 2021, 64 in 2022, 69 in 2023, 72 in 2024, and 75 in 2025, showing a slight expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 76, an increase of 1 from 2025, with an expansion rate of about 1.3%, which has limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Ranking has continuously risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition, increasing its appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation in 2023 was somewhat negative (involving a school management incident), but there have been no major negative public opinions in recent years; Douyin popularity ranks 71st overall, evaluated as "average", with moderate exposure on short video platforms, showing no clear signs of increased application attention; there are no abnormal historical admission records for Jiangnan University, and the admission trend is relatively stable; Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, both disciplines are at the national top level; Food Science and Engineering is the university's flagship major, with a high ranking in Heilongjiang Province admissions, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Food Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, and Artificial Intelligence have high social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province General College Entrance Examination is 167,000, a decrease of about 5,114 (-3%) from 2025 (Physics Category 117,407 + History Category 54,707 = 172,114). Estimating the Physics Category proportion at about 67% in recent years, the 2026 Physics Category candidates are about 111,890, a decrease of about 5,517 (-4.7%) from 117,407 in 2025, with a significant reduction in candidate scale, easing competition pressure; Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, part of the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some cross-provincial appeal to candidates from Heilongjiang; the university's enrollment scale in Heilongjiang Province is stable at around 70 people, a small proportion, so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings in the last two years, a slight expansion of 1 place in the 2026 plan, a reduction of about 4.7% in Physics Category candidates in Heilongjiang Province, and the continuous rise in university ranking: the reduction in candidates is the main factor easing competition, but the improvement in university level and the appeal of advantageous majors partially offset this effect. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 10,600, basically flat with a slight backward shift (ranking number slightly larger) compared to 10,565 in 2025, with a range of 10,100-11,100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 10,600, with a range of 10,100-11,100. Candidates with a ranking better than 10,100 can focus on Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Food Science and Engineering, Artificial Intelligence); those with a ranking between 10,100 and 10,600 are advised to mainly target Tier 2, with some attempts at Tier 1; those with a ranking between 10,600 and 11,100 should prioritize Tier 2 as safe choices and Tier 3 as backup; candidates with a ranking below 11,100 are advised to mainly target Tier 3 to secure admission. Food Science and Engineering (A+) is the university's flagship major and deserves special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1562 → 1238 → 1108 → 1396 → 1453, showing a trend of "first rising, then falling, then stabilizing": from 2021 to 2023, it moved forward year by year (from 1562 to 1108), then shifted backward to 1396 in 2024, and further to 1453 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 345 places in the last two years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 1453; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 16 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 20 in 2025, stabilizing at 20-22 in recent years; the 2026 plan is 20, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Ranking has continuously risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, with steadily improving rankings in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; the reputation evaluation in 2023 was slightly negative (involving a school management incident), but there has been no major negative public opinion in recent years; Douyin popularity ranks 71st overall, rated as "average," with no clear signs of increased application interest; no abnormal admission records for Jiangnan University in history; Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, both in science and engineering; the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Accounting, Ideological and Political Education, English, etc.) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines, and the discipline evaluation has limited appeal to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Law and Accounting are socially popular; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang general college entrance examination is 167,000, with an estimated History Category proportion of about 33% in recent years, resulting in approximately 55,110 History Category candidates in 2026, an increase of about 403 (+0.74%) from 54,707 in 2025, indicating a slight increase in candidate scale and slightly intensified competition; Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some cross-provincial appeal to Heilongjiang candidates; the university's History Category enrollment scale in Heilongjiang is about 20, a relatively small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in historical rankings in recent two years, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase of about 0.74% in History Category candidates, and the continuous improvement in university ranking: the slight increase in candidates and the backward ranking trend point to slightly intensified competition, but the improvement in university level has a positive effect on application popularity. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 1473, slightly backward from 1453 in 2025 (ranking number slightly larger), with a range of 1208-1738.
